news.t: Toews Agility Shares™ Managed Risk ETF Recognized as Top Rated among Morningstar's Options Trading ETFs Over 3-Year Period
Toews Agility Shares™ Announces MRSK and THY Moving to New York Stock Exchange

overview.description: The Toews Agility Shares Managed Risk ETF (MRSK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund shifts allocations between fixed income and equity securities, managing risks through option overlay strategies. MRSK was launched on Jun 25, 2020 and is issued by Toews.

data.title: Toews Agility Shares™ Managed Risk ETF Recognized as Top Rated among Morningstar's Options Trading ETFs Over 3-Year Period
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Toews Agility Shares™ Managed Risk ETF Recognized as Top Rated among Morningstar's Options Trading ETFs Over 3-Year Period.

data.title: Toews Agility Shares™ Announces MRSK and THY Moving to New York Stock Exchange
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $MRSK--Toews Agility Shares™ announces MRSK and THY moving to New York Stock Exchange.
